channel.title: Problem Solving on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Problem Solving on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio

item.title: Rosalind
item.description: Rosalind is a bioinformatics programming platform with numerous problems related to bioinformatics. This repo contains a few solutions that I wrote to solve these problems.

item.title: Project Euler
item.description: Project Euler is a mathematics platform with over 900 problems. These problems range in difficulty and their solutions require designing an efficient algorithm and mathematical skills. This repo contains some solutions that I wrote to solve these problems.
